    "deep_analysis": "Coherent's financial quality is WEAK despite recent revenue growth and margin expansion. Current price of $382.45 represents an 82% premium to conservative intrinsic value. The margin of safety is NEGATIVE—the stock would need to decline 60-70% to reach fair value.
